set.caption: Gauge-boson production in $\mathsf { e } ^ { + } , \mathsf { e } ^ { - }$ annihilation.

overrides.reason: C4 Figure 6.1: MinerU captured the image and caption on PDF page 74 (page_idx 73) but split the printed label 'Fig. 6.1.' into the page footer, so build_catalogs treated the block as unnumbered/excluded. The body text explicitly references Figure 6.1 immediately before this block.
